notes: GoRemote's aggregated global network spanning 150+ countries with 35,000+ access points and 300+ telecom providers. 1.2 billion access minutes per year run rate.
Windows-based universal access client that simplified network connection, login, and secure enterprise communications regardless of connection type. Included portal for enterprise applications.
Integrated security agent within MobileOffice providing policy management, enforcement, adaptive location-based protection, firewall, intrusion detection, and automatic remediation.
Core security technology for remote enterprise access. GoRemote offered optionally managed VPN services using IPSec or SSL.
Emerging wireless connectivity for mobile workers at airports, coffee shops, and hotels. Driving rapid displacement of dial-up for mobile workers.
Home and small office broadband technology replacing dial-up and ISDN. Typical cost $50/month. Being superseded by fiber.
Legacy WAN technology for branch offices at ~$600/month per circuit. Being displaced by DSL/cable broadband with massive cost savings.
Integrated Services Digital Network. Legacy regulated telecom service for remote sites, being displaced by broadband.
Internet Protocol Security for encrypted VPN tunnels. GoRemote offered managed IPSec VPN services for remote workers and branch offices.
Secure Sockets Layer for encrypted communications. GoRemote offered SSL as alternative to IPSec VPN for remote access.
